name: Heavenly Himachal Tour Package
overview: Immerse yourself in the celestial beauty of the Himalayas with our 'Heavenly Himachal Tour Package.' This 10-day retreat is designed for those who want to experience the grandeur of Himachal Pradesh at a relaxed and soulful pace. From the misty ridge of Shimla to the snow-covered Solang Valley in Manali, the spiritual vibes of Dharamshala, and the emerald meadows of Dalhousie, this tour offers a truly heavenly escape from the mundane.
highlights: Extended 10-day circuit for a relaxed and deep exploration
Panoramic views of the Dhauladhar and Pir Panjal ranges
Spiritual stay in McLeod Ganj, the home of the Dalai Lama
Visit to the world-famous Rohtang Pass (subject to permits)
Slow travel through the Palampur tea gardens and Kangra Valley
Stay in handpicked mountain resorts with premium amenities
Private cab with a professional mountain driver for the entire journey

itinerary.title: Chandigarh to Shimla - The Ascent Begins
itinerary.description: Meet our representative at Chandigarh and start your journey to Shimla. Enjoy the 5-hour drive through the green foothills. Reach Shimla by evening, check in to your hotel, and spend a peaceful night in the 'Queen of Hills'.

itinerary.title: Shimla & Kufri Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Explore the Kufri highlands, Green Valley, and the Himalayan Nature Park. Return to Shimla for a heritage walk on the Mall Road, visiting the Ridge, Christ Church, and Jakhu Temple.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali via Kullu
itinerary.description: A full-day scenic drive to Manali. Stop at Pandoh Dam and visit the Kullu Shawl factories. Enjoy the river-side views as you enter the Manali valley by evening.

itinerary.title: Manali Local Cultural Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the Hadimba Devi Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, and the Tibetan Monastery. Spend your afternoon at the Mall Road or in the quaint cafes of Old Manali.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley & Rohtang Pass
itinerary.description: Head to Solang Valley for adventure sports. If permits allow, proceed to the Rohtang Pass for a spectacular snow-point experience and glacier views.

itinerary.title: Manali to Dharamshala - Valley to Foothills
itinerary.description: Travel from Manali to Dharamshala, passing through the beautiful Palampur tea gardens. Arrive in the evening and relax at your hotel in the Dhauladhar foothills.

itinerary.title: McLeod Ganj & Dharamshala Local
itinerary.description: Visit the Dalai Lama Temple, Bhagsu Waterfall, and the St. John in the Wilderness Church. Explore the Tibetan markets for authentic souvenirs.

itinerary.title: Dharamshala to Dalhousie
itinerary.description: A short 4-5 hour drive to Dalhousie. Spend your afternoon exploring the local colonial churches and enjoying the quiet mountain air.

itinerary.title: Khajjiar - The Mini Switzerland
itinerary.description: Spend the day at Khajjiar's vast meadows and cedar forests. Visit the Khajji Nag Temple and enjoy the serene environment of this 'Mini Switzerland'.

itinerary.title: Dalhousie to Chandigarh - Final Drop
itinerary.description: Begin your descent to the plains. Drive back to Chandigarh (300 km, 8-9 hours) for your departure from the airport or railway station.

inclusions: Private cab (Sedan/SUV) for 10 days of travel
9 Nights stay in premium verified hotels
All toll, parking, fuel, and state taxes included
exclusions: Rohtang Pass permit and local cab if required

faqs.question: Is Rohtang Pass guaranteed?
faqs.answer: Rohtang Pass is subject to weather conditions and NGT permit availability. We assist in the process, but it is not guaranteed.

faqs.question: Can we extend the stay in Manali?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our packages are 100% customizable. We can add nights as per your preference.
